name: Meridian Mining UK Societas
description: Meridian Mining UK Societas is a resource company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Brazil. Its flagship asset is the Cabaçal gold-copper project, a highly prospective volcanic massive sulphide (VMS) belt located in the state of Mato Grosso. The company is dedicated to advancing this polymetallic district through systematic exploration, engineering, and development planning to establish a modern, scalable mining operation. With a leadership team based in London and Brazil, Meridian aims to unlock significant value from its extensive land package while maintaining a commitment to sustainable mining practices.
